jobs.descriptionSnippet: Xplore Inc. is Canada’s fibre, 5G and satellite broadband company for rural living. Xplore is building a world-class fibre optic and 5G wireless network to enable innovative broadband services for better every day rural living, for today and future generations. jobs.title: Chef de Produits (Product Manager)
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Contexte de l'entreprise Opsun est un leader canadien dans la conception, l'ingénierie et la fabrication de structures de montage solaires en aluminium.
